scripts.cape:build: bun run cape:prebuild && bun scripts/build.ts cape-cli/cli.config.ts
scripts.cape:build:all: bun run cape:prebuild && cd cape-cli && cape build --all-platforms
scripts.cape:install: bun run cape:build && mkdir -p $HOME/.cape/bin && cp dist/cape $HOME/.cape/bin/cape && echo 'Installed cape to ~/.cape/bin/cape'
